title: Fermentation Duration Calculator Payload
description: Schema for fermentation duration calculator inputs (product, method, temperature, style) and derived timing outputs (schedule, ready window, storage shift, and hints).

inputs.description: User and system-provided parameters describing the ferment batch.

product.description: What is being fermented and in what quantity.

type.description: Type of product being fermented, e.g. 'cabbage', 'cucumbers', 'peppers', 'mixed_vegetables'.

batchSize.description: Total batch size for this fermentation, expressed in the given unit.

householdId.description: Optional SSA household identifier for routing to the correct storehouse.

projectId.description: Optional project or batch id for linking to larger preservation projects.

label.description: Human-friendly label for this batch, e.g. 'Red Kraut - October'.

fermentation.description: Core fermentation parameters driving timing recommendations.

method.description: Primary fermentation method: brined, dry-salted, starter-based, wild, or other.

temperatureRange.description: Expected ambient or controlled temperature range during active fermentation.

min.description: Minimum expected temperature during fermentation in the given unit.

max.description: Maximum expected temperature during fermentation in the given unit.

saltPct.description: Salt percentage by weight (of vegetables or brine), where known.

starterType.description: If using a starter culture, the type (e.g. 'whey', 'sourdough_starter', 'kombucha', 'brine_from_previous_batch').

targetAcidity.description: Target acidity (pH) at the end of active fermentation, when known.

desiredShelfLifeDays.description: Desired shelf life (in days) at cold storage once the ferment is complete.

scheduleAnchor.description: Start timestamp for scheduling (defaults to now if omitted).

timezone.description: IANA timezone for generating schedule dates, e.g. 'America/Chicago'.

householdPreferences.description: Optional household-level preferences for timing and workload distribution.

avoidQuietHours.description: If true, schedule active tasks outside configured quiet hours.

avoidSabbath.description: If true, avoid starting new sessions during Sabbath window; checkpoints may be shifted.

maxDailyTasks.description: Soft maximum number of fermentation-related tasks per day.

outputs.description: Derived schedule, ready window, and linkage hints for SessionRunner and Storehouse.

schedule.description: Ordered list of fermentation phases with expected durations and checkpoints.

phaseId.description: Machine-friendly id for the phase, e.g. 'active_ferment', 'cold_storage'.

durationDays.description: Nominal duration of this phase in days.

startAt.description: ISO start timestamp for this phase.

endAt.description: ISO end timestamp for this phase.

checkpoints.description: Within-phase checkpoints such as 'burp jars', 'taste test', or 'move to cold'.

label.description: Short label, e.g. 'Burp jars / check activity'.

offsetDays.description: Offset (in days) from the start of this phase when the checkpoint should fire.

preferredTimeOfDay.description: Optional hint like 'morning', 'evening' or a specific hour.

targetReadyWindow.description: Date range when the ferment should be at peak flavor and texture.

start.description: Earliest recommended date/time for serving or using in meal planning.

end.description: Latest recommended date/time before quality noticeably declines.

storageShift.description: Planned move from room temperature to cold or root-cellar storage.

moveAt.description: When to move jars/crocks into cold storage.

targetStorage.description: Target storage location label, e.g. 'Fridge', 'Root Cellar', 'Cool Pantry'.

sessionSuggestions.description: Suggested SessionRunner sessions derived from phases and checkpoints.

id.description: Identifier for this suggested session template instance.

scheduledFor.description: Suggested date/time to run this session.

stepHints.description: Optional hints for steps that SessionRunner can materialize.

inventoryHints.description: Hints for when and how this ferment batch becomes available to the storehouse and meal planner.

itemKey.description: Internal storehouse key or SKU-like reference for this ferment batch.

quantity.description: Quantity that will be available for planning during the ready window.

unit.description: Unit for quantity (should align with inventory units).

readyFrom.description: Start of the window when this ferment is available to be consumed.

readyTo.description: End of the window when this ferment should ideally be used.

eligibleForMealPlanning.description: If true, this batch should be surfaced to meal planners during the ready window.

meta.description: Optional metadata about the calculator invocation.

calculatorId.description: Identifier for the calculator; used for routing and analytics.

householdId.description: Household id for attribution and routing.

sourceNode.description: Planning graph node id that initiated this calculation, e.g. 'PG_NODE_FERMENTATION_DURATION_CALCULATOR'.
